results.title: BEEE/BEE | DC Circuit | Series & Parallel | Lecture 01 | All University | Pradeep Giri Sir
results.reason: Pradeep Giri is a favorite for university exams due to his 'easy tricks' and structured approach to DC circuit fundamentals.
summary: Learn how electricity flows in simple circuits
Understand how to connect components in a line
See how parts work when placed side by side
Solve basic problems using simple math rules

results.title: Basic Electrical Engineering | Introduction to Basic Electrical Engineering
results.channel: Engineers ki Pathshala by Umesh Dhande
results.reason: Ranjan Rai is highly praised for conceptual clarity in introductory topics, making this an ideal starting point for IPU students.
summary: Discover the basic building blocks of electricity
Learn about voltage and how current moves
Understand why this subject matters for engineers
Get a clear overview of electrical systems

results.title: DC Circuit | ONESHOT | BEEE/BEE | Pradeep Giri Sir
results.reason: A comprehensive marathon session that ensures continuity in learning DC circuits, highly valued by students for last-minute preparation.
summary: Review all main circuit rules in one go
Learn to calculate power in different setups
Master the laws that govern electrical flow
Practice solving many types of circuit problems

results.title: UNIT-1I DC Circuits I One Shot I Electrical Engg. I by Avinash Sir I Gateway Classes I AKTU
results.reason: This one-shot video is highly efficient for exam revision, covering the entire DC Circuits unit which aligns well with the IPU syllabus.
summary: Study a complete guide to direct current
Learn how to simplify very complex circuits
Understand the key formulas for exam success
Follow step by step examples for better learning

results.title: Basic Electrical Engineering | Module 1 | DC Networks | Part 1 | OHM's Law & KVL (Lecture 01)
results.channel: Engineers ki Pathshala by Umesh Dhande
results.reason: Focuses heavily on the 'why' behind Ohm's Law and KVL, which are the most critical building blocks for the IPU Electrical Tech course.
summary: Understand the relationship between voltage and current
Learn how to track energy around a loop
Master the fundamental law of electrical resistance
Start solving circuits using two main rules
